sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ زَيْدٌ زَمِيلَهُ عَنْ خُطَطِ نِهَايَةِ الأُسْبُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Zejd je pitao kolegu o planovima za vikend.
sentences.translationEn: Zaid asked his colleague about weekend plans.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّهُ سَيَذْهَبُ مَعَ الأُسْرَةِ إِلَى الشَّاطِئِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je da će ići s porodicom na plažu.
sentences.translationEn: He said he would go with the family to the beach.

sentences.translation: Zejd ga je pitao o mjestu i vremenu.
sentences.translationEn: Zaid asked him about the place and time.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ زَيْدٌ أَنْ يَذْهَبَ مَعَهُمْ أَيْضًا.
sentences.translation: Zejd je odlučio da i on ide s njima.
sentences.translationEn: Zaid decided to go with them too.

sentences.arabic: فَرِحَ الجَمِيعُ وَانْتَظَرُوا يَوْمَ الجُمُعَةِ بِشَوْقٍ.
sentences.translation: Svi su se radovali i nestrpljivo čekali petak.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone was happy and eagerly waited for Friday.
